security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Smart billing and business management ERP for service-based businesses
bundle.longDescription: ASZ Nexus ERP is a modern desktop ERP solution focused on billing, invoicing, payments, customer management, inventory tracking, and daily business operations. Designed for service and trading businesses, it streamlines billing workflows, lead management, follow-ups, staff operations, and financial tracking from a single unified platform.
